_comment: Maps each bot GitHub username to path prefixes it's allowed to touch in a PR. Any role with an entry here is restricted to exactly those prefixes. Any role NOT listed is unrestricted (e.g. bot-dev — full codebase access is intentional, the real gate for Dev is branch protection blocking direct pushes, not path restriction).
_qa_note: Confirmed by ADR 0001: Playwright e2e tests live at repo-root e2e/.
